data.raceComments: {"comment":"1. IT'S LATE has been mixing form lately, hitting the frame two back before finishing fourth (22.83) at this track in a Grade 5. Can turn form around here. 2. GREMLIN comes off an average effort last start when eighth at this track over 390m behind Kraken Rum (23.01) in a Grade 5. Comes through a solid form race last start. Expected to feature in the finish. 8. PELICAN'S SUNDAY has been mixing form lately, hitting the frame two back before finishing fourth (24.45) at Bendigo in a Grade 5. Key player on best and worth another try. 7. TIPSY TILLY is always hard to beat when she races here at this trip.","runners":[1,2,8,7],"exclusive":false}
